title: AI Disruption Self-Assessment Tool
description: This assessment will help you understand how AI might impact your business.

questions.text: Do employee salaries and wages make up more than 50% of your business expenses?
Do most of your employees use similar skills to complete their tasks?
Are these tasks relatively simple and straightforward to complete?
Can your business handle mistakes in these tasks without significant financial loss or customer impact?
Do you have more than 4 employees focused on language-intensive tasks like writing, editing, translating, or managing audio/text communications?
Can new employees in these roles be fully trained in less than 1 month?
Are these employees paid more than $100,000PA?
Do these language-intensive tasks often follow predictable patterns or templates that could be easily replicated?
Does your business depend on defined processes that follow a specific sequence of steps?
Are these processes performed the same way each time?
Can these processes be documented as a standard set of steps?
Would your business remain competitive if these processes were automated?

results.label: Low Risk
results.description: Your business appears to have a lower risk of AI disruption in the near term. However, staying informed about AI developments is still important.

results.label: Medium Risk
results.description: Your business shows moderate vulnerability to AI disruption. Consider exploring how AI might augment your work or create new opportunities.

results.label: High Risk
results.description: Your business shows significant vulnerability to AI disruption. Get in touch with Stakwork to learn more about how we can help your business take advantage of AI.
